content: Backend: mandatory assigned_to on breakdowns/warnings (all 4 endpoints), WO always created, remove auto_create_work_order, technicians in public report-context
Backend: DELETE /line-runtime-logs (admin) with machine fan-out cleanup
Frontend: ReportBreakdownDialog — required Technician dropdown, remove Auto-WO checkbox (all entry points)
Frontend: Runtime calendar view — month grid with logged/partial/missing coloring + per-line day dialog (admin CRUD, others view-only)
